narrative:
Pulaski Twp township has 1,577 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
